title: Career Opportunity Teacher at MBD Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at MBD Group
jsonLd.description:
MBD Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MBD Group:
MBD Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
